refresh_implementation_proposal_v2.scope: Build an offline replay packet before any prompt, guardrail, DevHub, or release-state mutation.

missing_facts.expected_prompt: Please confirm the contractor license status or say that no contractor license applies before I prepare draft fixture choices.
Please confirm whether applications, calculations, and supporting documents are prepared as separate PDFs from drawing plans.

stale_evidence.notice: The property-owner authorization evidence is stale; use it only as a review question until refreshed by cited fixture evidence.

conflicting_evidence.notice: The case contains conflicting file-preparation assumptions; ask the reviewer to reconcile single drawing PDF guidance with separate supporting-document PDFs.

next_safe_actions.description: Review the cited missing facts, stale evidence, and conflicting evidence with the user.
Prepare a local draft question list for reviewer approval without changing any external system.

blocked_actions.explanation: Blocked: the replay packet can explain fixture evidence and draft reversible text, but cannot change official records.
Blocked: financial checkout entry remains outside fixture replay and requires a separate attended checkpoint.
